test.name: TC-007 Verify that delete asset API can work correctly

kw.name: Verify User Can Delete Asset Correctly
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=DeleteAssets, url=http://localhost:8082, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8082/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '51', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "doppio", "password": "weBuildBestQa"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=http://localhost:8082/assets/a001 path_url=/assets/a001 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'token': 'ezY_MiaQlxhWXLoBNK4TZ64R8CskROPU', 'Content-Length': '82', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"assetId": "a001", "assetName": "Smart Robot", "assetType": "4", "inUse": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8082/assets path_url=/assets headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'token': 'at77O-1DrabyKk_ppfJjF0KmDasHJOTA'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:8082/assets status=200, reason= headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Date': 'Mon, 17 Feb 2025 03:30:54 GMT', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=60', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=[{"assetId":"a002","assetName":"Lenovo B112","assetType":2,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a003","assetName":"Apple Iphone 11","assetType":3,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a004","assetName":"Macbook Air","assetType":1,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a005","assetName":"Xiaomi Mi6","assetType":4,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a000","assetName":"Smart Robot","assetType":4,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a006","assetName":"Smart Robot","assetType":4,"inUse":true},{"assetId":"a008","assetName":"Smart Robot","assetType":4,"inUse":true}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
